disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe burning retrosternal chest pain that woke the patient from sleep a few hours after lying down
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the pain and where it is?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a burning, pressing pain right behind my breastbone. It woke me up gasping a few hours after I went to sleep.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sour acidic regurgitation into the mouth and a sudden rush of salty watery saliva
trigger_question_examples: Do you get any acid or fluid coming up into your throat or mouth?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — sour, acidic stuff comes up into my throat, and my mouth suddenly fills with salty watery spit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms worse lying flat and partly relieved by sitting up and by oral antacid
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make it better or worse — lying down, sitting up, antacids?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Lying flat makes it much worse, so I'm staying upright. The antacid took the edge off for a little while.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Onset immediately after a large, heavy, spicy meal eaten late at night
trigger_question_examples: What were you doing before it started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'd had a big heavy spicy meal quite late, then went to bed, and it woke me up not long after.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic night-time non-productive cough and early-morning throat clearing
trigger_question_examples: Do you get a night-time cough or a need to clear your throat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I do get a dry cough at night and I'm always clearing my throat first thing in the morning.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No cold sweat, no pain spreading to the arm, neck or jaw, and no breathlessness at rest
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain spreading to your arm, neck or jaw?
Are you sweaty or clammy, or short of breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it's not going into my arm or jaw, I'm not in a cold sweat, and my breathing feels okay when I sit still.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No difficulty or pain swallowing, no vomiting of blood or coffee-ground material, no black or tarry stools, no weight loss
trigger_question_examples: Any trouble swallowing, or food sticking?
Have you vomited any blood or noticed black, tarry stools?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I can swallow fine, I haven't vomited any blood or seen anything black in the toilet, and my weight's been steady.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High anxiety about a cardiac cause; patient is home alone with no one to assist or drive him
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling about all this?
Is anyone at home with you tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm really scared it's my heart, and I'm on my own here tonight with no one to help me.
